src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Replace abstract Dropwizard-based metrics class with a concrete Micrometer-based Spring component.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.why_exists: The original abstract class relied on Dropwizard metrics APIs which are removed or incompatible with the new Micrometer-based architecture; code depending on the old interface would fail to compile or link.
The new implementation requires a MeterRegistry instance to create metrics; without this field and constructor, the class cannot function.
The new code uses Micrometer classes (Counter, Timer, MeterRegistry) which must be imported to compile.
The class is now a concrete Spring bean managed by the container; without the annotation, it won't be instantiated or injected.
The old abstract class likely had abstract methods for timing; this concrete implementation provides the actual Micrometer Timer logic required for runtime functionality.
The old abstract class likely had abstract methods for counters; this concrete implementation provides the actual Micrometer Counter logic required for runtime functionality.
